meaning: adj.凶猛的,猛烈的,热烈的,暴躁的<美>极讨厌的,难受的,<英方>精力旺盛的
examples: There's been some fierce competition for the title.
The plans have already come in for fierce criticism.
She spoke in a fierce whisper.
And yet the engine, that growling, fierce-sounding engine, is actually a veteran 4.2-litre straight-six from Jaguar.
Bruce is not alone in displaying a fierce partiality to his corner of the Scilly Isles.
